home_subtitle: Protect your identity without compromising privacy
theme_desc: Choose how the app looks on your device.
language_desc: Pick the language used throughout the app.
about_desc: Version, privacy details, and app information.
disclaimer_intro: This app is a non-commercial portfolio showcase built strictly for educational and demonstration purposes. All assets, images, and content displayed here are dummy/placeholder materials used solely to illustrate design and engineering capabilities.
disclaimer_rights: We do not host, distribute, stream, or monetize any copyrighted media. All visual assets are either royalty-free, self-produced, or sourced from open-licensed libraries. If you believe any content requires removal, please reach out via the developer channels below.
assets_body: All images, illustrations, and media used in this app are placeholders or mock assets intended to simulate a real document workflow for portfolio demonstration. No real products or services are offered.
purpose_body: Aman-Geh is a mobile watermarking portfolio project demonstrating Flutter, Riverpod state management, GoRouter navigation, Easy Localization (i18n), and on-device image rendering. It is not a commercial product and does not generate revenue.
developer_tagline: A showcase of mobile engineering & privacy-first utilities.
offline_desc: No data is ever sent to any server. Everything stays on your device.
sandbox_desc: Images are processed within the app sandbox and never leak to the public gallery.
privacy_first_desc: Your documents never leave your device. We have zero access to your data.
about_description: Aman-Geh helps you add watermarks to document photos before sharing them. Everything runs on-device, with no uploads and no tracking.
